name: Oxfam America
mission:
Oxfam is a global organization that fights inequality to end poverty and injustice. We offer lifesaving
support in times of crisis and advocate for economic justice, gender equality, and climate action. We
demand equal rights and equal treatment so that everyone can thrive, not just survive. The future is
equal.
theoryOfChange: Oxfam America has a published 'Oxfam America 2030 Strategy Framework'. This framework, approved in March 2020, guides their work towards fighting inequality to end poverty and injustice. It focuses on systemic change in four key areas: economic justice & equal rights, humanitarian response, climate action, and women's rights and gender justice. The strategy also outlines a commitment to revolutionizing their approach through open and humble collaboration with partners, allies, and supporters, leveraging the power of the US for global impact, and striving to become a feminist and anti-racist organization.

scoreSummary: Oxfam AmericaHQ shows exceptional impact and good alignment.

ui_signals_v1.recommendation_rationale: Strong donor fit, low risk profile, and credible supporting evidence for outcomes.

components.evidence: Asnaf: fuqara (+5); Operates in Muslim-majority regions (+3); Strong humanitarian service (+4)
components.name: Muslim Donor Fit

components.improvement_suggestion: Expand services to underserved populations or geographies with limited nonprofit coverage.
components.name: Underserved Space

alignment.rationale: Alignment 34/50: HIGH Muslim donor fit, humanitarian cause area

score_details.score_summary: Oxfam AmericaHQ shows exceptional impact and good alignment.

zakat.claim_evidence: Organization is in zakat denylist (partners but doesn't collect directly) (Source: https://www.oxfamamerica.org/donate/)

all_citations.claim: Oxfam America holds a Charity Navigator score of 99.33333333333333/100 and focuses on international relief and economic justice.
The organization works with local organizations to empower poor people to play a central role in development.
all_citations.source_name: Download our most recent financial audit

all_citations.claim: Evaluations in Ghana track metrics such as laws passed with civil society input and media competence.
all_citations.source_name: Download NORAD Ghana Final Project Evaluation Report

all_citations.claim: Program effectiveness is measured by civil society understanding of technical oil and gas issues in Mozambique.
all_citations.source_name: Download NORAD Mozambique Final Project Evaluation Report

all_citations.claim: Oxfam's impact includes successfully having civil society proposed amendments adopted by the Tanzania parliament.
all_citations.source_name: Download NORAD Tanzania Final Project Evaluation Report

all_citations.claim: The organization accepts general charitable donations and sadaqah to support its mission.
The organization reported total revenue of $75,339,434 and a program expense ratio of 72.3%.

baseline_narrative.amal_score_rationale: Oxfam America earns a strong overall rating due to its exceptional transparency and high alignment with humanitarian cause urgency, though its direct impact score is moderated by its complex systemic-change model.
areas_for_improvement: High cost per beneficiary relative to direct-service peers
Fundraising efficiency could be optimized to reduce the $0.21 cost per dollar raised

dimension_explanations.alignment: Oxfam America shows high alignment for donors interested in humanitarian causes and systemic economic justice [1]. The organization is a well-established entity for those seeking to provide sadaqah to support long-term community development and emergency relief efforts globally [6].
dimension_explanations.impact: The organization demonstrates high program effectiveness through direct service and policy advocacy, such as successfully proposing amendments adopted by parliament in Tanzania [5]. While the program expense ratio is 72.3%, the organization maintains a high data confidence level through rigorous external evaluations of its projects in Ghana and Mozambique [3][4].

baseline_narrative.headline: Oxfam America empowers marginalized communities through economic justice and emergency response to create lasting solutions to poverty.
strengths: High financial accountability with a Charity Navigator score of 99.33333333333333/100
Strong liquidity with 8.0 months of working capital
Proven track record in influencing legislative policy and civil society capacity
baseline_narrative.summary: Oxfam America is a global organization that partners with local entities to provide funds and empower individuals to lead development within their own communities [2]. The organization focuses on international relief, emergency response, and economic justice initiatives to address the root causes of inequality [1][7].

all_citations.quote: Oxfam works with local organizations, providing funds and empowering poor people

all_citations.claim: emergency response, economic justice, and climate action
all_citations.quote: Programs: Emergency Response, Economic Justice, Gender Equality, Climate Action
Operates in Muslim-majority regions (+3); Strong humanitarian service (+4)

all_citations.claim: Muslim-majority regions including Gaza, Yemen, and Afghanistan
all_citations.quote: Geographic Coverage: Middle East, Lebanon, Ukraine, Gaza, Kenya, Mali, Senegal, Afghanistan

all_citations.claim: Platinum Seal of Transparency from Candid
all_citations.quote: Platinum Seal of Transparency from Candid

all_citations.claim: influenced two laws passed with CSO input
perfect 100/100 score in Leadership and Culture

rich_narrative.amal_score_rationale: Oxfam America earns a strong overall rating due to its exceptional transparency and high alignment with humanitarian cause urgency, though its direct impact score is moderated by its complex systemic-change model.

areas_for_improvement.context: The <cite id="15">72.3% program expense ratio</cite> is lower than the <cite id="16">90.3% peer median</cite> for humanitarian organizations.
It costs the organization <cite id="17">$0.19 to raise every $1</cite>, which is higher than some leaner direct-relief peers.

bbb_assessment.summary: Oxfam America is an Accredited Charity meeting all standards for accountability.

case_against.mitigation_notes: Oxfam's high reserves and institutional stability mitigate short-term revenue fluctuations.
risk_factors: <cite id="24">3-year revenue growth is -9.1%</cite>, indicating a recent contraction in funding
<cite id="17">Fundraising efficiency of $0.19/$1</cite> is moderate but not industry-leading
case_against.summary: The primary concern is financial efficiency: <cite id="15">72.3% of expenses goes to programs</cite>, which is below the <cite id="23">75% industry standard</cite>.

confidence.data_freshness: Financial data from 2024 Form 990 and Audit
confidence.notes: Extremely high data availability due to institutional transparency.

known_gaps: Detailed beneficiary count for 2024 not in summary

alignment.explanation: While secular, Oxfam has <cite id="6">deep roots in Muslim-majority regions</cite> and addresses <cite id="21">high-urgency humanitarian needs</cite> that align with Islamic values of social justice.
alignment.improvement: To better serve Muslim donors, the charity could <cite id="22">expand services to underserved geographies</cite> with limited current nonprofit coverage.

credibility.explanation: Oxfam is a top-tier institution with <cite id="13">perfect scores in leadership and culture</cite>. They undergo <cite id="18">annual consolidated financial audits</cite> and maintain a <cite id="9">Platinum Candid Seal</cite>.
credibility.improvement: Credibility is already near-perfect; maintaining current <cite id="9">high transparency standards</cite> is recommended.

impact.explanation: The charity delivers impact at a <cite id="19">cost of $79.01 per beneficiary</cite>, which is efficient for complex humanitarian work. They track <cite id="20">five distinct outcome metrics</cite> via Candid.
impact.improvement: Impact could be enhanced by improving the <cite id="15">72.3% program expense ratio</cite> to align closer with the <cite id="16">90.3% peer median</cite>.

donor_fit_matrix.evidence_rigor: Grade B - Strong outcome tracking and external evaluations

grantmaking_profile.grant_strategy: Empowers local organizations to lead community development

rich_narrative.headline: Oxfam America empowers marginalized communities through economic justice and emergency response to create lasting solutions to poverty.

ideal_donor_profile.best_for_summary: Best for donors who value institutional stability and want to support systemic solutions to poverty through a mix of direct aid and policy advocacy.
donor_motivations: Want to support long-term economic justice
Value high-level transparency and independent board oversight
Prefer organizations with a significant global footprint
Interested in climate action as a driver of poverty
giving_considerations: Donations support a large-scale NGO with significant overhead costs
Focus is on secular humanitarian principles rather than faith-based delivery
Revenue has seen a recent decline of -9.1% over three years
ideal_donor_profile.not_ideal_for: Donors seeking a 100% donation model or those who only want to fund direct, short-term emergency supplies without advocacy.

impact_evidence.evidence_grade_explanation: Grade B reflects <cite id="20">consistent outcome tracking</cite> and multiple <cite id="26">external project evaluations</cite>.
impact_evidence.theory_of_change_summary: Oxfam uses an integrated approach to combat poverty by <cite id="25">empowering local communities</cite> and <cite id="7">influencing global policy</cite>.
impact_evidence.why_evidence_matters: Evidence ensures that advocacy efforts actually result in legislative changes that benefit the poor.

long_term_outlook.room_for_funding_explanation: With a <cite id="24">-9.1% revenue CAGR</cite>, Oxfam has significant capacity to absorb new funding to restore program levels.

peer_comparison.differentiator: Distinguished by its <cite id="7">focus on legislative advocacy</cite> alongside direct relief, unlike many peers who only provide aid.

similar_organizations.differentiator: More focused on direct aid delivery
similar_organizations.name: Baitulmaal, Inc.

strengths.detail: The organization maintains a <cite id="8">99.99.33333333333333/100 from Charity Navigator</cite> and a <cite id="9">Platinum Seal of Transparency from Candid</cite>.
Oxfam holds <cite id="10">8.0 months of working capital</cite>, ensuring they can sustain operations during global crises.
Beyond direct aid, Oxfam successfully <cite id="11">influenced two laws passed with CSO input</cite> in Ghana, demonstrating systemic impact.

strengths_deep_dive: Oxfam America's operational strength lies in its massive grantmaking capacity and local empowerment model. In 2024, the organization distributed <cite id="12">$71,590,162 in foreign grants</cite> to 354 different recipients. This approach ensures that aid is culturally competent and locally led. Their commitment to transparency is verified by a <cite id="13">perfect 100/100 score in Leadership and Culture</cite> from independent evaluators. Furthermore, they maintain a <cite id="14">100% independent board</cite>, which provides rigorous oversight of executive compensation and strategic direction.
rich_narrative.summary: Oxfam America is a global humanitarian organization that has worked to end the injustice of poverty since its <cite id="1">founding in 1942</cite>. Unlike charities that only provide temporary aid, Oxfam focuses on <cite id="2">empowering local organizations</cite> to lead development within their own communities. This strategy addresses the root causes of inequality through <cite id="3">emergency response, economic justice, and climate action</cite>. The organization operates at a massive scale, reporting <cite id="4">$83,115,051 in total revenue</cite> for the 2024 fiscal year. While it is a mainstream secular organization, it maintains a <cite id="5">high Muslim donor fit</cite> due to its extensive work in <cite id="6">Muslim-majority regions including Gaza, Yemen, and Afghanistan</cite>. Oxfam is distinguished by its dual approach: providing immediate life-saving aid while simultaneously <cite id="7">influencing legislative policy</cite> to create systemic change. Their financial health is exceptionally strong, evidenced by a <cite id="8">99.33/100 overall score from Charity Navigator</cite>. This rating reflects a commitment to transparency and governance that few international NGOs match. For donors seeking to support long-term resilience alongside disaster relief, Oxfam offers a proven, institutional-grade platform for global impact.
